content: Self-Refine's iterative self-feedback loop for improving outputs can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a framework where the model not only corrects its own work but actively challenges it from disjoint angles at each refinement step. This hybrid approach retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no additional training or supervision while addressing its common limitation of getting stuck in local optima from narrow self-feedback.
